chunks.title: v6.2.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v6.2.7
Tag: v6.2.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-15T09:06:29Z; created_at: 2025-05-15T08:35:00Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Forward more methods to underlying InputStream in NonClosingInputStream [#34893](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34893)
- Introduce Spring property for the default property placeholder escape character [#34865](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34865)
- Close ApplicationContext once AOT processing has completed [#34841](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34841)
- Fix `AbstractJackson2HttpMessageConverter#getObjectMappersForType` nullness [#34811](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34811)
- Add option for case-insensitive match to PatternMatchUtils [#34801](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34801)
- RestClient `@RequestBody` parameters lose generic type information when creating HTTP service beans [#34793](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34793)
- Adds option to set Principal in MockServerWebExchange [#34789](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34789)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- Beans created by FactoryBean are not considered as autowiring candidates if another thread holds a singletonLock [#34902](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34902)
- `PropertySourcesPlaceholderConfigurer` placeholder resolution fails in several scenarios [#34861](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34861)
- HttpComponentsClientHttpRequestFactory setConnectionRequestTimeout not working with httpclient 5.3.1 [#34851](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34851)
- Fragment.create() requires mutable map - which is unusable when used with Kotlin [#34848](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34848)
- Duplicate `BeanOverrideHandler` discovered in `@Nested` test case with superclass from different class or in interface implemented multiple times [#34844](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34844)
- Accidental ClassLoader defineClass enforcement after #34677 [#34824](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34824)
- HttpEntity.EMPTY headers should not be possible to mutate via HttpHeaders constructor [#34812](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34812)
- AbstractFileResolvingResource.exists incorrectly reports result for resources inside of spring-boot executable jar [#34796](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34796)
- Correctly expand query param with same name from URI variables array  [#34783](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34783)
- R2DBC `NamedParameterUtils` only expands reused collection parameter once [#34768](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34768)
- `PathMatchingResourcePatternResolver` wrongly assumes that `target/classes` always exists [#34764](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34764)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Clarify `CompositePropertySource` behavior for `EnumerablePropertySource` contract [#34886](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34886)
- Javadoc and `@Nullable` annotation for `servletContext` parameter of `ConfigurableWebEnvironment.initPropertySources` are contradictory [#34845](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34845)
- Spring MVC: `@EnableAsync` needs to be redeclared for each ApplicationContext [#34843](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34843)
- Provide a working example instead of unclear placeholders [#34828](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34828)
## :hammer: Dependency Upgrades
- Upgrade to Micrometer 1.14.7 [#34889](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34889)
- Up...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the spring-projects/spring-framework release v6.2.7, the release note introduces a Spring property for the default property placeholder escape character, closes ApplicationContext once AOT processing has completed, adds an option for case-insensitive match to PatternMatchUtils, fixes a bug where Beans created by FactoryBean are not considered as autowiring candidates if another thread holds a singletonLock, fixes PropertySourcesPlaceholderConfigurer placeholder resolution failures in several scenarios, fixes HttpComponentsClientHttpRequestFactory setConnectionRequestTimeout not working with httpclient 5.3.1, fixes duplicate BeanOverrideHandler discovered in @Nested test cases, fixes accidental ClassLoader defineClass enforcement, fixes AbstractFileResolvingResource.exists incorrectly reporting results for resources inside spring-boot executable jar, fixes R2DBC NamedParameterUtils only expanding reused collection parameter once, clarifies CompositePropertySource behavior for EnumerablePropertySource contract in documentation, and upgrades to Micrometer 1.14.7.

chunks.title: v7.0.0-M5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v7.0.0-M5
Tag: v7.0.0-M5; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-05-15T10:31:35Z; created_at: 2025-05-15T09:30:20Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Deprecate `PropertyPlaceholderConfigurer` and `PreferencesPlaceholderConfigurer` for removal [#34880](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34880)
- Add Consumer based variant methods to HttpRequestValues builder [#34870](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34870)
- Add defaultApiVersion to RestClient and WebClient builders [#34857](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34857)
- Evaluate system properties in default HttpClient in ReactorClientHttpRequestFactory [#34850](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34850)
- Use beanClassLoader in the HTTP Service Registrar [#34846](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34846)
- Deprecate JUnit 4 support in the Spring TestContext Framework [#34794](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34794)
- Ability to validate supported API versions only against explicitly configured ones [#34775](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34775)
- Revisit Jackson support [#33798](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/33798)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- `ClassFileAnnotationMetadata.fromTypeDescriptor(…)` fails on Java 24 [#34882](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34882)
- Align ClassFileClassMetadata with other implementations [#34869](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34869)
- Incorrect filtering of groups with HttpServiceGroupConfigurer [#34867](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34867)
- Aggregated Javadoc no longer published since 7.0.0-M4 [#34774](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34774)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Add Reference Documentation for API Versioning [#34569](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34569)
## :hammer: Dependency Upgrades
- Upgrade to Kotlin 2.1.21 [#34900](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34900)
- Upgrade to Micrometer 1.15.0 [#34888](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34888)
- Upgrade to Reactor 2025.0.0-M3 [#34897](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34897)
## :heart: Contributors
Thank you to all the contributors who worked on this release:
@dmitrysulman, @philwebb, and @siom79
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the spring-projects/spring-framework release v7.0.0-M5, the release note deprecates PropertyPlaceholderConfigurer and PreferencesPlaceholderConfigurer for removal, adds Consumer based variant methods to HttpRequestValues builder, adds defaultApiVersion to RestClient and WebClient builders, evaluates system properties in default HttpClient in ReactorClientHttpRequestFactory, uses beanClassLoader in the HTTP Service Registrar, deprecates JUnit 4 support in the Spring TestContext Framework, adds ability to validate supported API versions only against explicitly configured ones, revisits Jackson support, fixes ClassFileAnnotationMetadata.fromTypeDescriptor(…) failing on Java 24, aligns ClassFileClassMetadata with other implementations, fixes incorrect filtering of groups with HttpServiceGroupConfigurer, fixes aggregated Javadoc no longer published since 7.0.0-M4, adds Reference Documentation for API Versioning, and upgrades to Kotlin 2.1.21, Micrometer 1.15.0, and Reactor 2025.0.0-M3.

Release: v6.2.8

- Remove reference to Aspec...

chunks.title: v7.0.0-M6
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v7.0.0-M6
Tag: v7.0.0-M6; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-06-12T10:22:51Z; created_at: 2025-06-12T09:49:39Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Allow `FixedBackOff` to be constructed with only a custom interval [#35028](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35028)
- Use String.replace in MetadataEncoder [#35025](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35025)
- Revise `@Nullable` declarations for `contains*()` methods in `CollectionUtils` [#35023](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35023)
- Introduce `JacksonJsonMessageConverter.getObjectMapper()` [#34963](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34963)
- Remove `(String, String)` variants of `setProperty()` and `withProperty()` from `MockEnvironment` [#34948](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34948)
- Allow access to `env` from `SupplierContextDsl` [#34943](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34943)
- Consistently declare nullability `@Contract` for core utilities [#34934](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34934)
- Update HttpServiceGroupConfigurer API [#34926](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34926)
- Make `ProblemDetailJacksonXmlMixin` compatible with Jackson 3 [#34925](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34925)
- Introduce hints in `RestClient` API [#34924](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34924)
- Add Kotlin body advices [#34923](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34923)
- Add support for callable references to `BeanRegistrarDsl` [#34922](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34922)
- Additional updates for API versioning in test and client support [#34919](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34919)
- Define nullability `@Contract` for `quote` and `getFilename` in `StringUtils` [#34896](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34896)
- Support `@Import` on interfaces [#34820](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34820)
- Use HexFormat in CharacterEditor [#34798](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34798)
- Use HexFormat in ContentDisposition [#34797](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34797)
- Introduce minimal retry functionality as a core framework feature [#34716](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34716)
- Add support for "application/\*+x-protobuf" media type [#34645](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34645)
- Support OutputStream and InputStream in HTTP Interface clients [#32358](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/32358)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- `@Contract` for `SupplierUtils.resolve(Supplier)` incorrectly declares `!null -> !null` [#34987](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34987)
- Consistent null check on injection points for pre-existing singleton beans [#34952](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34952)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Refine null-safety documentation terms [#34982](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34982)
- Stop referring to JUnit 5 in documentation [#34970](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34970)
- Fix typos in API versioning [#34961](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34961)
- Add missing `since` attributes for `@Deprecated` declarations [#34942](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34942)
- Improve Javadoc for `getFilename()` and `getFilenameExtension()` in `StringUtils` [#34932](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34932)
- Add documentation for HTTP service proxy registry [#34912](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34912)...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the spring-projects/spring-framework release v7.0.0-M6, the release note allows FixedBackOff to be constructed with only a custom interval, revises @Nullable declarations for contains*() methods in CollectionUtils, introduces JacksonJsonMessageConverter.getObjectMapper(), removes (String, String) variants of setProperty() and withProperty() from MockEnvironment, allows access to env from SupplierContextDsl, consistently declares nullability @Contract for core utilities, updates HttpServiceGroupConfigurer API, makes ProblemDetailJacksonXmlMixin compatible with Jackson 3, introduces hints in RestClient API, adds Kotlin body advices, adds support for callable references to BeanRegistrarDsl, adds additional updates for API versioning in test and client support, defines nullability @Contract for quote and getFilename in StringUtils, supports @Import on interfaces, uses HexFormat in CharacterEditor and ContentDisposition, introduces minimal retry functionality as a core framework feature, adds support for application/*+x-protobuf media type, supports OutputStream and InputStream in HTTP Interface clients, fixes @Contract for SupplierUtils.resolve(Supplier) incorrectly declaring !null -> !null, and fixes consistent null check on injection points for pre-existing singleton beans.

chunks.title: v6.2.9
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v6.2.9
Tag: v6.2.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-07-17T07:54:02Z; created_at: 2025-07-17T07:26:27Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- `OncePerRequestFilter` cannot be CGLib-proxied [#35198](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35198)
- Consistently catch `InaccessibleObjectException` next to `IllegalAccessException` [#35190](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35190)
- Introduce `Date`-to-`Instant` and `Instant`-to-`Date` converters [#35175](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35175)
- Consistent nullability and exception declarations in `AbstractMessagingTemplate` hierarchy [#35159](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35159)
- Register runtime hints for `Instant`-to-`Timestamp` conversion [#35156](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35156)
- Improve handling of `ResponseEntity<?>` in Spring MVC [#35153](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35153)
- Support `@CacheConfig("myCacheName")` declarations for simplified configuration [#35152](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35152)
- Declare `messageSelector` parameters in `JmsOperations` as `@Nullable` [#35151](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35151)
- Add getter for `OverflowStrategy` in `ConcurrentWebSocketSessionDecorator` [#35132](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35132)
- Use preset Content-Type for streaming and reactive responses in Spring MVC [#35130](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35130)
- Leniently tolerate null `@Aspect` bean [#35074](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35074)
- `DataAccessResourceFailureException` thrown when transaction times out on PostgreSQL [#35073](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35073)
- `MethodInvokingFactoryBean` fails to invoke publicly exported methods overridden by internal classes when using JPMS [#34028](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34028)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- Restore preference for interface (most abstract) method in `getPubliclyAccessibleMethodIfPossible` [#35189](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35189)
- Make `targetBeanName` field in AbstractBeanFactoryBasedTargetSource `protected` to avoid exceptions in logging and `toString()` [#35172](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35172)
- Fix inconsistencies in `StaticListableBeanFactory` [#35119](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35119)
- Support StreamingHttpOutputMessage in RestClient [#35102](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35102)
- When building `DELETE` requests, the request body is not used in `JdkClientHttpRequest.buildRequest` [#35068](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35068)
- AOT-generated bean registration file contains "too many constants" when building with many beans [#35044](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35044)
- Prevent cache pollution by storing only the factories [#34732](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34732)
- WebFlux decodes wildcard content-types as form-data/multipart [#34660](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34660)
- AOT-generated CGLib proxies do not contain method overrides [#34642](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34642)
- 500 response for ResourceHttpRequestHandler when requested range is not satisfied [#34490](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34490)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Document how to register runtime hints for convention-based conversion [#35178](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35178)
- Link to `@ContextConfiguration` Javadoc from reference manual [#3508...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the spring-projects/spring-framework release v6.2.9, the release note introduces Date-to-Instant and Instant-to-Date converters, registers runtime hints for Instant-to-Timestamp conversion, improves handling of ResponseEntity<?> in Spring MVC, supports @CacheConfig("myCacheName") declarations for simplified configuration, declares messageSelector parameters in JmsOperations as @Nullable, adds getter for OverflowStrategy in ConcurrentWebSocketSessionDecorator, uses preset Content-Type for streaming and reactive responses in Spring MVC, leniently tolerates null @Aspect bean, fixes DataAccessResourceFailureException thrown when transaction times out on PostgreSQL, fixes MethodInvokingFactoryBean failing to invoke publicly exported methods overridden by internal classes when using JPMS, restores preference for interface method in getPubliclyAccessibleMethodIfPossible, makes targetBeanName field in AbstractBeanFactoryBasedTargetSource protected, fixes inconsistencies in StaticListableBeanFactory, supports StreamingHttpOutputMessage in RestClient, fixes DELETE request body not used in JdkClientHttpRequest.buildRequest, fixes AOT-generated bean registration file containing too many constants, prevents cache pollution by storing only the factories, fixes WebFlux decoding wildcard content-types as form-data/multipart, fixes AOT-generated CGLib proxies not containing method overrides, and fixes 500 response for ResourceHttpRequestHandler when requested range is not satisfied.

chunks.title: v7.0.0-M7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v7.0.0-M7
Tag: v7.0.0-M7; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-07-17T10:04:05Z; created_at: 2025-07-17T09:36:46Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- LocalDataSourceJobStore should re-initialize statically registered Quartz ConnectionProvider on context restart [#35208](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35208)
- Make rootObject parameter consistently nullable [#35206](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35206)
- Refine multipart converter registration in HttpMessageConverters [#35203](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35203)
- Introduce `getSource()` in `ApplicationContextEvent` with covariant return type [#35197](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35197)
- Introduce `ContextRestartedEvent` as a subtype of `ContextStartedEvent` [#35194](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35194)
- Align HttpMessageConverters builder with WebFlux codecs variants [#35187](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35187)

Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v6.2.10
Tag: v6.2.10; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-08-14T07:46:40Z; created_at: 2025-08-14T07:15:43Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Optimize NIO path resolution in `PathEditor` [#35304](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35304)
- Make `type` in `ProblemDetail` nullable [#35294](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35294)
- Refine UriUtils#decode and StringUtils#uriDecode implementation and documentation [#35253](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35253)
- Provide configurable `useCaches` option for `URLConnection` usage in `UrlResource` (avoiding jar file leak) [#35218](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35218)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- `@Scheduled` tasks running in `SimpleAsyncTaskScheduler` are interrupted immediately on context close [#35254](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35254)
- `ScriptUtils.executeSqlScript()` does not support multiple results per statement [#35248](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35248)
- Successful Autowiring Dependent on Configuration ordering and Primary Bean flag [#35239](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35239)
- Locale parameter in MessageSource#getMessage methods should be nullable [#35230](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35230)
- Allow any `@Transactional` propagation for `@TransactionalEventListener` with BEFORE\_COMMIT phase [#35150](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35150)
- Catalog name should be handled with the provided case [#35064](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35064)
- Accept support for generated keys column name array on HSQLDB and Derby as well [#34790](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34790)
- Handle direct CanncelationException on timeout in JdkClientHttpRequest [#34721](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34721)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Add documentation of RequestMapping about SpEL [#35232](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35232)
- Document SqlBinaryValue behaviour with PostgreSQL [#34786](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34786)
## :hammer: Dependency Upgrades
- Upgrade to Micrometer 1.14.10 [#35313](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35313)
- Upgrade to Reactor 2024.0.9 [#35312](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35312)
## :heart: Contributors
Thank you to all the contributors who worked on this release:
@Allan-QLB, @carsago, @cw-dimedis, and @giampa91

Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v7.0.0-M8
Tag: v7.0.0-M8; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-08-14T08:27:19Z; created_at: 2025-08-14T07:59:11Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Only add `httpServiceProxyRegistry` bean when necessary [#35307](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35307)
- Introduce `@Proxyable` annotation for bean-specific proxy type [#35296](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35296)
- Introduce bean definition attribute for enforcing an interface-based proxy [#35293](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35293)
- Let Spring Boot consistently switch to CGLIB proxies for any proxy processor (including `@Retryable`, `@Async` etc.) [#35286](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35286)
- HTTP method support in MappedInterceptor [#35273](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35273)
- Post process outgoing messages in JmsClient [#35271](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35271)
- Introduce `ConfigurableApplicationContext.pause()` and `SmartLifecycle.isPauseable()` [#35269](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35269)
- Provide support to configure request interceptors in RestTestClient [#35268](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35268)
- Provide more control over validation in DefaultApiVersionStrategy [#35267](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35267)
- PathApiVersionResolver should not be nullable [#35265](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35265)
- Replace `useRequestParam` with `useQueryParam` in `ApiVersionConfigurer` to align with client [#35263](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35263)
- Add support for MediaType in ApiVersionInserter [#35259](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35259)
- ApiVersionConfigurer misconfiguration is hard to detect when no version resolvers are added [#35256](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35256)
- Support HttpServiceClient annotation [#35244](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35244)
- Prefer mapping without version for requests without a version [#35237](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35237)
- Provide `@WebSocketScope` annotation and public `SCOPE_WEBSOCKET` constant (for consistency with `@RequestScope` and co) [#35235](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35235)
- Allow getting receipt from StompSession.Subscription.unsubscribe() [#35224](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35224)
- Support wildcard path elements at the start of path patterns [#35213](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35213)
- Improve handling of request parameter without values in MockMvc [#35210](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35210)
- Display original request URI in NoResourceFoundException message [#34553](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/34553)
- Add RestTestClient [#34428](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34428)
- Support Hibernate StatelessSession [SPR-2495] [#7184](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/7184)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- Fix `JacksonJsonSockJsMessageCodec` imports [#35309](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35309)
- IllegalStateException: No API version attribute [#35236](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35236)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Document constraints for HTTP range requests [#35227](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35227)
## :hammer: Dependency Upgrades
- Upgrade to Hibernate ORM 7.1 [#35308](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35308)
- Upgrade to Jackson 3.0.0-rc6 and 2.19.2 [#35228](https://github.com/sprin...

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v6.2.11
Tag: v6.2.11; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-11T07:40:54Z; created_at: 2025-09-11T06:58:32Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Missing `@Nullable` on JsonPathAssertions.isEqualTo [#35445](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35445)
- Graceful fallback for non-default NIO.2 FileSystems [#35443](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35443)

- Detect Informix error codes as `DuplicateKeyException` [#35400](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35400)
- Inconsistent nullability for `String value` arguments in `ResponseCookie` `from*()` factory methods [#35377](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35377)
- Revisit `taskTerminationTimeout` semantics on `SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor/Scheduler` [#35372](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35372)
- `StandardEvaluationContext.setBeanResolver` should allow `@Nullable BeanResolver` [#35371](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35371)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- "mainThreadPrefix = null " Causing multiple background bean locks to be blocked [#35409](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35409)
- Annotation not found on parameter in overridden method unless method is public [#35349](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35349)
- Annotations on overridden methods not found in type hierarchy with unresolved generics [#35342](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35342)
- Performance degradation when using singleton beans with Provider<T> [#35330](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35330)
- JettyClientHttpConnector buffer leak in Spring Framework 6.2 [#35319](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35319)
- Spring application hangs on shutdown with `@Scheduled`(cron=…) when custom ScheduledExecutorService bean is defined (Java 19+) [#35316](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35316)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Document potential need to use `Mockito.doXxx()` to stub a `@MockitoSpyBean` [#35410](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35410)
- Fix links to Reactive Libraries and RestTemplate [#35392](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35392)
- Fix broken link in WebDriver docs [#35374](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35374)
- Document Web DataBinder support for RouterFunction [#35367](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35367)
- Improve documentation for `ApplicationEvents` to clarify recommended usage [#35335](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35335)
- Document terms and units in `DataSize.parse()` [#35298](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35298)
- Refine `@Contract` Javadoc [#35285](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35285)
- Correct the default value of nestedTransactionAllowed in JpaTransactionManager javadoc [#35212](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35212)
## :hammer: Dependency Upgrades
- Upgrade to Micrometer 1.14.11 [#35455](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35455)
- Upgrade to Reactor 2024.0.10 [#35454](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35454)
## :heart: Contributors
Thank you to all the contributors who worked on this release:
@Dockerel, @Kehrlann, @acktsap, @khj68, @ngocnhan-tran1996, @scordio, and @sgflt

Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework
Release: v7.0.0-M9
Tag: v7.0.0-M9; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-09-11T12:18:55Z; created_at: 2025-09-11T11:39:32Z
Release notes:
## :star: New Features

- Include current exception in log message for failed retry attempt [#35433](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35433)
- Remove HttpServiceClient Annotation Support [#35431](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35431)
- Deprecate `put(MergedContextConfiguration, ApplicationContext)` in `ContextCache` [#35415](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35415)

- Expose retry attempts in RetryException [#35351](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35351)
- RetryException#getCause should not be nullable [#35332](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35332)
- Refine CORS logging for non-processed requests due to no CORS configuration [#35314](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35314)

- Revise `StartupStep` to implement `AutoCloseable` [#35277](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35277)
- Add compression support in JdkClientHttpRequestFactory [#35225](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/35225)
- Add support for Micrometer context propagation in Kotlin coroutines [#35185](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35185)
- Add support for Forwarded By HTTP header [#34683](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/34683)
- Update HttpStatus to align with RFC9110 where relevant [#32870](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/32870)
- `ContextCache` should close evicted context before loading new context [#21007](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/21007)

- Refine `Nullness` for Kotlin functions returning `Unit` [#35420](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35420)
- Invalid Nullness information for Kotlin properties [#35419](https://github.com/spring-pro...

Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework

Release notes:
## :star: New Features
- Add "forEachByte" variant to DataBuffer for efficient traversing [#35623](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35623)

- Nested transaction support via savepoints is broken in HSQLDB database [#35564](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35564)
- SpEL expression parser uses more CPU after upgrade to 6.2.9 [#35556](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35556)
- Thread race during FactoryBean instantiations starting with 6.2 due to lenient locks [#35545](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35545)
- Update parsed path handling in UrlHandlerFilter [#35538](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35538)
- ResourceHttpMessageWriter.write has unexpected error handling for invalid range requests (offset > content length) [#35536](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35536)

@YaSuenag, @dmitrysulman, and @nosan

- Refine `BindingReflectionHintsRegistrar` with `ObjectToObjectConverter` hints [#35847](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35847)
- Add `resetCaches()` method to general CacheManager interface [#35845](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35845)
- Enhance handleTypeMismatch error message in ResponseEntityExceptionHandler [#35837](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/35837)

- Avoid duplicate flushes in StringHttpMessageConverter [#36065](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36065)
- When no API version is provided, static resources fail to load [#36059](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36059)

- Declare `TaskCallback` return value as potentially nullable [#36057](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36057)
- Fix case-insensitive semantics for LinkedCaseInsensitiveMap entrySet [#36056](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/36056)
- Update to NullAway 0.12.15 and fix new warnings [#36054](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/36054)

Repository: spring-projects/spring-framework

Release notes:
## :warning: Attention Required
- Optimize request and response header handling in Spring MVC [#36334](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36334)
## :star: New Features
- Consistent adaptation of HTTP headers on Servlet responses [#36343](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36343)
- Copy methodAnnotations in MethodParameter copy constructor [#36342](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/pull/36342)
- Improve performance of validation groups determination in WebFlux [#36336](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36336)
- Reuse `AnnotatedMethod` annotation cache in derived instances [#36322](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36322)
- Optimize the addition of a charset to the MediaType in AbstractHttpMessageConverter [#36320](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36320)
- Optimize `MediaType(MediaType, Charset)` constructor [#36318](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36318)
- Detect all common size exceptions from Tomcat and Commons FileUpload 2.x [#36317](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36317)
- Consistently support `@Autowired` as a meta-annotation [#36315](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36315)
- Avoid duplicate `required` attribute lookup for `@Autowired` annotations [#36314](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36314)
- Cache `@ResponseBody` presence per controller class in `RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor` [#36311](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36311)
## :lady_beetle: Bug Fixes
- ResolvableType#getGenerics() breaks serialization [#36346](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36346)
- DefaultHttpMessageConverters not adding provided configurer [#36332](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36332)
- Restore early MessageConsumer creation for temporary queue [#36321](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36321)
- Multipart upload leak on client abort (ByteBuf.release() not called) [#36262](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36262)
## :notebook_with_decorative_cover: Documentation
- Document that SpEL expressions using `Optional` with null-safe and Elvis operators are not compilable [#36331](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36331)
- Improve documentation of baseline API version to emphasize version must be supported [#36316](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36316)
- Stop referring to obsolete `ListenableFuture` in documentation [#36313](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36313)
- Stop referring to standard Java features as "Java 8" features in documentation [#36310](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/36310)
## :heart: Contributors
Thank you to all the contributors who worked on this release:
@Niravil and @TAKETODAY

questions.query_text: In the spring-projects/spring-framework releases, which release introduces minimal retry functionality as a core framework feature and adds support for application/*+x-protobuf media type?

answer_support.answer_text: introduces minimal retry functionality as a core framework feature ... adds support for application/*+x-protobuf media type

questions.query_text: Across the spring-projects/spring-framework releases, how does the retry-related change described in v7.0.0-M7 differ from the retry-related change described in v7.0.0-M9?

options.text: v7.0.0-M7 removes maxDuration/maxElapsedTime support from RetryPolicy and redesigns RetryPolicy to directly incorporate BackOff, while v7.0.0-M9 introduces onRetryPolicyInterruption() callback in RetryListener and exposes retry attempts in RetryException.
v7.0.0-M7 introduces @Retryable annotation, while v7.0.0-M9 removes all retry support.
Both releases only update Micrometer dependency versions without retry changes.
